title: Lens Facet Report (lens-facet v1.0)
description: Deterministic additive facet assignments for repo paths. A facet is a navigation view-axis derived from a controlled path/suffix rule. Facets are additive (cardinality 0..n per path) and never replace the single Primary Lens. This artifact establishes no truth, correctness, completeness, semantic importance, review priority, security verdict or change impact. canonical_md remains the only content truth.

item_count.description: Total number of (path, facet) assignments in items.

target_count.description: Number of distinct paths that carry at least one facet.

facet_counts.description: Count of assignments per controlled facet name.

path.description: Canonical repo-relative POSIX path of valid Unicode scalar text. Forbidden: control and C1 characters (U+0000-U+001F, U+007F-U+009F), line/paragraph separators (U+2028/U+2029), BOM (U+FEFF), and surrogates (unpaired UTF-16 surrogate code units under ECMAScript Unicode-regex validation; surrogate code points under Python); whitespace-only paths; Windows drive prefix; leading or trailing slash; empty/'.'/'..' components; backslash. Emoji and other astral Unicode scalars are allowed. Facet v1 artifact-surface policy, not a global Lenskit filename policy.

derivation_type.description: Facet Model v1 emits only 'direct'. The general lens model reserves 'derived' and 'heuristic' for later, structurally derived facet rules; they are not valid in a v1 report. Not a confidence/probability/quality score and carries no implicit ordering.

does_not_establish.description: Fixed canonical negative-semantics tuple: exactly these nine values in this exact order, matching the producer output. Reordered, missing or extra entries are rejected.
